30	    db.add(promo)
31	    await db.flush()
32	    await db.refresh(promo)
33	    await log_audit(db, str(current_user.id), "promotion", str(promo.id), "create", new_value=body.model_dump(mode="json"))

41	    if not p:
42	        raise NotFoundError("Promotion")
43	    return p

46	@router.patch("/{promo_id}", response_model=PromotionResponse)
47	async def update_promotion(promo_id: uuid.UUID, body: PromotionUpdate, current_user=Depends(require_roles("admin", "finance")), db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db)):
48	    result = await db.execute(select(Promotion).where(Promotion.id == promo_id))
49	    p = result.scalar_one_or_none()
50	    if not p:
51	        raise NotFoundError("Promotion")
52	    old = {k: getattr(p, k) for k in body.model_dump(exclude_none=True)}
53	    for k, v in body.model_dump(exclude_none=True).items():
54	        setattr(p, k, v)
55	    await db.flush()
56	    await log_audit(db, str(current_user.id), "promotion", str(p.id), "update",
57	                    old_value={k: str(v) for k, v in old.items()},
58	                    new_value=body.model_dump(exclude_none=True, mode="json"))
59	    return p
60

64	    result = await db.execute(select(Promotion).where(Promotion.id == promo_id))

20	class Page(BaseModel, Generic[T]):

25	def paginate_query(query: Any, page: int, page_size: int) -> tuple[Any, int, int]:
26	    """Return (query_with_limit_offset, offset, limit)."""
27	    from app.core.config import settings
28	    page_size = min(page_size, settings.MAX_PAGE_SIZE)
29	    offset = (page - 1) * page_size
30	    return query.offset(offset).limit(page_size), offset, page_size

6	
7	class AppError(Exception):
8	    def __init__(self, message: str, status_code: int = status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST):
9	        self.message = message
10	        self.status_code = status_code
11	        super().__init__(message)

13	
14	class NotFoundError(AppError):

16	        super().__init__(f"{resource} not found.", status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND)
17	
18	
19	class UnauthorizedError(AppError):

22	
23	
24	class ForbiddenError(AppError):

27	
28	
29	class GoneError(AppError):
30	    def __init__(self, detail: str = "Resource no longer available."):
31	        super().__init__(detail, status.HTTP_410_GONE)
32	
33	
34	class ConflictError(AppError):
35	    def __init__(self, detail: str = "Conflict."):
36	        super().__init__(detail, status.HTTP_409_CONFLICT)
37	
38	
39	class UnprocessableError(AppError):
40	    def __init__(self, detail: str = "Unprocessable."):
41	        super().__init__(detail, status.HTTP_422_UNPROCESSABLE_ENTITY)
42	
43	
44	def register_exception_handlers(app: FastAPI) -> None:
45	    @app.exception_handler(AppError)
46	    async def app_error_handler(request: Request, exc: AppError) -> JSONResponse:
47	        return JSONResponse(
48	            status_code=exc.status_code,
49	            content={"detail": exc.message},
50	        )
51	
52	    @app.exception_handler(RequestValidationError)
53	    async def validation_error_handler(request: Request, exc: RequestValidationError) -> JSONResponse:
54	        return JSONResponse(

56	            content={"detail": exc.errors()},
57	        )
58	
59	    @app.exception_handler(Exception)
60	    async def unhandled_error_handler(request: Request, exc: Exception) -> JSONResponse:
61	        return JSONResponse(

5	from app.core.config import settings
6	from app.core.exceptions import UnauthorizedError
7	from app.core.security import (
8	    blocklist_token,
9	    create_access_token,
10	    create_refresh_token,
11	    decode_token,
12	    hash_password,
13	    revoke_all_refresh_tokens,
14	    store_refresh_token,
15	    touch_last_seen,
16	    verify_and_consume_refresh_token,
17	    verify_password,
18	)
19	from app.modules.auth.schemas import TokenResponse
20	from app.modules.users.repository import UserRepository
21	from jose import JWTError
22	
23	
24	class AuthService:
25	    def __init__(self, db: AsyncSession) -> None:
26	        self._repo = UserRepository(db)
27	
28	    async def login(self, username: str, password: str) -> TokenResponse:
29	        user = await self._repo.get_by_username(username)
30	
31	        if not user:
32	            raise UnauthorizedError("Invalid credentials.")
33	
34	        # Lockout check
35	        if user.locked_until and user.locked_until > datetime.now(UTC):
36	            raise UnauthorizedError(
37	                f"Account locked. Try again after {user.locked_until.isoformat()}."
38	            )
39	
40	        if not verify_password(password, user.password_hash):
41	            attempts = user.failed_login_attempts + 1
42	            lock_until = None
43	            if attempts >= settings.LOGIN_MAX_ATTEMPTS:
44	                lock_until = datetime.now(UTC) + timedelta(minutes=settings.LOCKOUT_DURATION_MINUTES)
45	                attempts = 0  # reset after locking
46	            await self._repo.update_login_failure(user.id, attempts, lock_until)
47	            raise UnauthorizedError("Invalid credentials.")
48	
49	        if not user.is_active:
50	            raise UnauthorizedError("Account is inactive.")
51	
52	        # Reset failure counter on success
53	        await self._repo.update_login_success(user.id)
54	
55	        access_token = create_access_token(str(user.id), user.role)
56	        refresh_token = create_refresh_token(str(user.id))
57	        await store_refresh_token(str(user.id), refresh_token)
58	        await touch_last_seen(str(user.id))  # start inactivity clock
59	
60	        return TokenResponse(access_token=access_token, refresh_token=refresh_token)
61	
62	    async def refresh(self, refresh_token: str) -> TokenResponse:
63	        try:
64	            payload = decode_token(refresh_token)
65	        except JWTError:
66	            raise UnauthorizedError("Invalid refresh token.")
67	
68	        if payload.get("type") != "refresh":
69	            raise UnauthorizedError("Invalid token type.")
70	
71	        user_id: str = payload.get("sub")
72	        valid = await verify_and_consume_refresh_token(user_id, refresh_token)
73	        if not valid:
74	            raise UnauthorizedError("Refresh token has been used or revoked.")
75	
76	        user = await self._repo.get_by_id(user_id)
77	        if not user or not user.is_active:
78	            raise UnauthorizedError("User not found or inactive.")
79	
80	        new_access = create_access_token(str(user.id), user.role)
81	        new_refresh = create_refresh_token(str(user.id))
82	        await store_refresh_token(str(user.id), new_refresh)
83	
84	        return TokenResponse(access_token=new_access, refresh_token=new_refresh)
85	
86	    async def logout(self, access_token: str, user_id: str) -> None:
87	        await revoke_all_refresh_tokens(user_id)
88	        ttl = settings.ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES * 60
89	        await blocklist_token(access_token, ttl)
90	        # Clear inactivity state so a re-login always gets a fresh window
91	        from app.core.security import get_redis
92	        await get_redis().delete(f"last_seen:{user_id}")
93	
94	    async def change_password(self, user_id: str, current_password: str, new_password: str) -> None:
95	        user = await self._repo.get_by_id(user_id)
96	        if not user:
97	            raise UnauthorizedError()
98	        if not verify_password(current_password, user.password_hash):
99	            raise UnauthorizedError("Current password is incorrect.")
100	        new_hash = hash_password(new_password)
101	        await self._repo.update_password(user.id, new_hash)
102	        await revoke_all_refresh_tokens(user_id)

1	# Meridian Training Operations System — Backend
2	
3	Production-grade, fully offline training management platform.
4	
5	## Start
6	
7	```bash
8	docker compose up
9	```
10	
11	All services build automatically. No manual setup required.
12	
13	## Service URLs
14	
15	| Service | URL |
16	|---|---|
17	| API | http://localhost/api |
18	| API Docs (Swagger) | http://localhost/api/docs |
19	| API Docs (ReDoc) | http://localhost/api/redoc |
20	| MinIO Console | http://localhost:9001 (minioadmin / minioadmin123) |
21	| Prometheus | http://localhost:9090 |
22	| Grafana | http://localhost:3000 (admin / admin) |
23	
24	## Verification
25	
26	```bash
27	# Health check
28	curl http://localhost/api/monitoring/health
29	# → {"status": "ok", "timestamp": "..."}
30	
31	# Login with default admin
32	curl -X POST http://localhost/api/auth/login \
33	  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
34	  -d '{"username": "admin", "password": "Admin@Meridian1"}'
35	```
36	
37	## Default Credentials
38	
39	| Role | Username | Password |
40	|---|---|---|
41	| Admin | `admin` | `Admin@Meridian1` |
42	
43	**Change the admin password immediately after first login.**
44	
45	## Configuration
46	
47	Copy `backend/.env.example` to `backend/.env` for local override. All secrets are loaded from environment variables — never hardcoded.
48	
49	Key secrets to rotate in production:
50	- `SECRET_KEY` — JWT signing key
51	- `FIELD_ENCRYPTION_KEY` — Fernet key for PII encryption
52	- `PAYMENT_SIGNATURE_SECRET` — HMAC key for terminal callbacks
53	- `MINIO_SECRET_KEY` — MinIO credentials
54	
55	## Running Tests
56	
57	```bash
58	# Inside the backend container or with local Python env:
59	docker compose exec backend pytest tests/ -v --cov=app --cov-report=term-missing
60	```
61	
62	## Architecture
63	
64	- **Backend**: FastAPI on port 8000, proxied by Nginx on port 80
65	- **Database**: PostgreSQL 15 — all state persisted here
66	- **Cache/Queue**: Redis — JWT blocklist, Celery broker, dedup sets
67	- **Jobs**: Celery worker + Beat for all scheduled tasks
68	- **Video**: MinIO (S3-compatible) for session recordings
69	- **Streaming**: Kafka for data ingestion
70	- **Monitoring**: Prometheus scrapes `/api/monitoring/metrics`; Grafana visualises
71	
72	## WebSocket Live Room
73	
74	Connect via `WS /api/ws/sessions/{session_id}/room?token=<access_jwt>`
75	
76	Receives real-time push events: `room_state`, `session_status_changed`, `attendee_joined`, `attendee_left`, `roster_update`.
77

24	async def _resolve_stream_user(token: str, db: AsyncSession):
25	    """Resolve a user from a ?token= query param (used for video streaming)."""
26	    from app.modules.users.repository import UserRepository
27	    try:
28	        payload = decode_token(token)
29	    except JWTError:
30	        raise UnauthorizedError("Invalid token.")
31	    if payload.get("type") != "access":
32	        raise UnauthorizedError("Invalid token type.")
33	    if await is_token_blocklisted(token):
34	        raise UnauthorizedError("Token has been revoked.")
35	    user_id: str = payload.get("sub")
36	    if not user_id:
37	        raise UnauthorizedError()
38	    user = await UserRepository(db).get_by_id(user_id)
39	    if not user or not user.is_active:
40	        raise UnauthorizedError("User not found or inactive.")
41	    return user

20	    import zoneinfo
21	    tz = zoneinfo.ZoneInfo(tz_name)
22	    if dt.tzinfo is None:
23	        return dt.replace(tzinfo=tz)
24	    return dt.astimezone(tz)

28	    def __init__(self, db: AsyncSession) -> None:
29	        self._repo = SessionRepository(db)
30	        self._db = db

32	    async def _check_room_conflict(
33	        self,
34	        room_id: uuid.UUID,
35	        start: datetime,
36	        end: datetime,
37	        buffer_minutes: int,
38	        exclude_id: uuid.UUID | None = None,
39	    ) -> None:
40	        from sqlalchemy import and_, or_
41	        buffered_end = end + timedelta(minutes=buffer_minutes)
42	        q = (
43	            select(Session)
44	            .where(Session.room_id == room_id)
45	            .where(Session.status != SessionStatus.cancelled)
46	            .where(and_(Session.start_time < buffered_end, Session.end_time > start))
47	        )
48	        if exclude_id:
49	            q = q.where(Session.id != exclude_id)
50	        result = await self._db.execute(q)
51	        conflict = result.scalar_one_or_none()
52	        if conflict:
53	            raise ConflictError(
54	                f"Room conflict: session already scheduled {conflict.start_time}–{conflict.end_time} (including buffer)."
55	            )

27	def _verify_signature(payload: PaymentCallbackPayload) -> bool:
28	    message = f"{payload.terminal_ref}{payload.amount}{payload.timestamp}"
29	    expected = hmac.new(
30	        settings.PAYMENT_SIGNATURE_SECRET.encode(),
31	        message.encode(),
32	        hashlib.sha256,
33	    ).hexdigest()
34	    return hmac.compare_digest(expected, payload.signature)
35	
36	
37	class PaymentService:
38	    def __init__(self, db: AsyncSession) -> None:
39	        self._db = db
40	
41	    async def handle_callback(self, payload: PaymentCallbackPayload) -> PaymentResponse:
42	        sig_ok = _verify_signature(payload)
43	
44	        result = await self._db.execute(
45	            select(Payment).where(Payment.order_id == payload.order_id)
46	        )
47	        payment = result.scalar_one_or_none()
48	        if not payment:
49	            raise NotFoundError("Payment")
50	
51	        payment.terminal_ref = payload.terminal_ref
52	        payment.callback_received_at = datetime.now(UTC)
53	        payment.signature_verified = sig_ok
54	        payment.raw_callback = payload.model_dump(mode="json")
55	
56	        if sig_ok:
57	            payment.status = PaymentStatus.completed
58	            # Mark order as paid
59	            order_result = await self._db.execute(select(Order).where(Order.id == payload.order_id))
60	            order = order_result.scalar_one_or_none()
61	            if order:
62	                order.status = OrderStatus.paid
63	                order.paid_at = datetime.now(UTC)
64	                # Auto-create pending bookings for each purchased session
65	                items_result = await self._db.execute(
66	                    select(OrderItem).where(OrderItem.order_id == order.id)
67	                )

Perfect! Now I have all the information I need. Let me create a comprehensive report on each issue:

## Issue Verification Report

**BLOCKER ISSUES:**

### 1. DataOps ingestion create flow sends `config_json` while backend schema requires `config`
**Status: CONFIRMED**
- **Frontend evidence** (IngestionSourceFormPage.vue:34): Line 34 sends `config_json: JSON.parse(form.value.config)` as part of the payload
- **Backend evidence** (ingestion/schemas.py:12): The `IngestionSourceCreate` schema expects field named `config: dict` (not `config_json`)
- **Impact**: The form submission will fail because the backend won't recognize the `config_json` field; the schema validation expects `config`

### 2. Promotions preview called from frontend but backend has no `/promotions/preview` route
**Status: CONFIRMED**
- **Frontend evidence** (admin.ts:162): `previewPromotion: async (payload: object) => { const res = await client.post('/api/promotions/preview', payload)`
- **Backend evidence** (promotions/controller.py): Routes defined are: list (line 18), create (line 27), get (line 37), update (line 46), delete (line 62). No `/preview` endpoint exists.
- **Impact**: Any frontend call to preview promotions will return 404

### 3. Finance payments list page requests `/api/payments`, but backend has no payments list endpoint
**Status: CONFIRMED**
- **Frontend evidence** (PaymentListPage.vue:13): `const res = await client.get('/api/payments', { params: { page_size: 50 } })`
- **Backend evidence** (payments/controller.py): Endpoints are callback (line 17), simulate (line 23), get single (line 29), list refunds (line 34), but no `/payments` list endpoint. Only `/payments/{order_id}` exists.
- **Impact**: PaymentListPage will fail to load with 404

**HIGH SEVERITY ISSUES:**

### 4. `MINIO_BUCKET` referenced but config defines `MINIO_BUCKET_RECORDINGS`
**Status: CONFIRMED**
- **Config definition** (config.py:39): `MINIO_BUCKET_RECORDINGS: str = "session-recordings"`
- **Issue locations**: 
  - payments/controller.py:112 references `settings.MINIO_BUCKET` (undefined)
  - ingestion/service.py:134 references `_settings.MINIO_BUCKET` (undefined)
  - replays/service.py uses correct `MINIO_BUCKET_RECORDINGS`
- **Impact**: Payments export download and batch file ingestion will fail with AttributeError

### 5. Orders list scope too broad for non-learner authenticated roles
**Status: CONFIRMED** (partial - has safeguard)
- **Controller evidence** (checkout/controller.py:37-42): Line 40 sets `learner_id = current_user.id if current_user.role == "learner" else None`. If non-learner, `learner_id=None` means the query returns ALL orders regardless of role.
- **Issue**: Admin, finance, and instructor roles can see all learners' orders without restriction. No object-level filtering for other roles.
- **Impact**: Finance/admin can access any learner's order without authorization checks

### 6. Simulate payment can be called by any authenticated user
**Status: CONFIRMED**
- **Controller evidence** (payments/controller.py:24): `async def simulate_payment(order_id: uuid.UUID, _=Depends(get_current_user), ...)`  uses only `get_current_user` (any authenticated user)
- **Service evidence** (payments/service.py:88): No order ownership validation in `simulate_payment()` method
- **Impact**: Any logged-in user can trigger a payment for any order, bypassing payment terminals

### 7. Booking history endpoint lacks object-level authorization
**Status: CONFIRMED**
- **Controller evidence** (bookings/controller.py:42-45): The endpoint accepts any authenticated user with `_=Depends(get_current_user)` and returns booking history for ANY booking_id without checking ownership
- **Issue**: A learner can request history for another learner's booking
- **Impact**: Information disclosure - users can access booking history of other users

### 8. Pagination contract drift: `meta.total_count` vs `total`
**Status: CONFIRMED**
- **Backend definition** (pagination.py:13): `class PageMeta(BaseModel): total_count: int`
- **Frontend usage**:
  - bookings.ts:7 expects `{ items: Booking[]; total: number }` (NOT `meta.total_count`)
  - checkout.ts:15 expects `{ items: Order[]; total: number }` (NOT `meta.total_count`)
  - admin.ts:170 expects `{ items: AuditLog[]; total: number }` (NOT `meta.total_count`)
- **Issue**: Backend returns `Page[T]` with `meta: PageMeta` containing `total_count`, but frontend endpoints expect flat `total` field
- **Impact**: All paginated list endpoints will fail; frontend tries to access `.total` on nested response

**MEDIUM SEVERITY ISSUES:**

### 9. Attendance stats API/UX field mismatch
**Status: CONFIRMED** (partial field mismatch)
- **Schema definition** (attendance/schemas.py:27-34): `AttendanceStats` has `minutes_attended`, `checked_in`, `late_joins`, `avg_minutes_attended`, `replay_completion_rate`
- **Frontend usage** (AttendanceManagePage.vue:16): Component expects `{ minutes_attended: number; late_count: number; completion_pct: number }`
- **Mismatch**: Backend has `late_joins` but frontend expects `late_count`; backend has `replay_completion_rate` but frontend expects `completion_pct`
- **Impact**: Stats display will fail or show undefined values

### 10. Cancel order returns 204 but frontend expects Order payload
**Status: CONFIRMED**
- **Controller evidence** (checkout/controller.py:50): `@router.patch("/orders/{order_id}/cancel", status_code=204)` returns no body (204 No Content)
- **Frontend evidence** (checkout.ts:19): `cancelOrder: async (id: string) => { const res = await client.patch(...) return res.data as Order }`
- **Store usage** (checkout.ts:54): `async function cancelOrder(id: string) { order.value = await checkoutApi.cancelOrder(id) ...}`
- **Impact**: Frontend receives empty/undefined response, fails to update order state

### 11. Frontend lockout handling expects 423 with `locked_until`, backend emits 401
**Status: CONFIRMED**
- **Frontend expectation** (LoginPage.vue:35): `if (e.statusCode === 423) { lockedUntil.value = e.errors?.locked_until ...`
- **Backend behavior** (auth/service.py:36-37): Raises `UnauthorizedError(f"Account locked. Try again after {user.locked_until.isoformat()}.")` which returns HTTP 401 (from exceptions.py:21)
- **Issue**: Backend doesn't have a 423 (Locked) exception class; uses 401 Unauthorized instead
- **Impact**: Frontend's lockout UI will never trigger; locked users get generic "Invalid credentials" message

### 12. README says no hardcoded secrets but docker-compose has them
**Status: CONFIRMED**
- **README.md:47**: "All secrets are loaded from environment variables — never hardcoded."
- **docker-compose.yml hardcoded secrets**:
  - Line 6: `SECRET_KEY: "super-secret-change-in-production-..."`
  - Line 8: `PAYMENT_SIGNATURE_SECRET: "terminal-hmac-secret-change-in-production"`
  - Line 12: `MINIO_SECRET_KEY: minioadmin123`
  - Line 223: `GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_PASSWORD: admin`
- **Impact**: Documentation contradiction; production instructions don't match actual defaults

**LOW SEVERITY ISSUES:**

### 13. Frontend checkout tests stale vs current checkout store API
**Status: CONFIRMED**
- **Test mocks** (checkout.spec.ts:8-10): Mocks `getBestOffer`, `applyPromo`, `confirmCart`, `getOrders` methods
- **Actual API** (checkout.ts): Only exports `createCart`, `getOrder`, `getOrders`, `cancelOrder` — no `getBestOffer`, `applyPromo`, or `confirmCart` methods
- **Test usage** (checkout.spec.ts:55, 78): Tests call `checkoutApi.getBestOffer()` and `store.confirmCart()` which don't exist in the actual API
- **Impact**: Tests are mocking non-existent API methods and testing non-existent store functionality; tests provide false confidence

All 13 issues are **CONFIRMED** as still present. Here's the summary:

---

## Blockers (3/3 confirmed)

| # | Issue | Key Finding |
|---|-------|-------------|
| 1 | `config_json` vs `config` field | `IngestionSourceFormPage.vue:34` sends `config_json`, schema expects `config` |
| 2 | No `/promotions/preview` route | `admin.ts:162` POSTs to it; `promotions/controller.py` has no such endpoint |
| 3 | No `/api/payments` list endpoint | `PaymentListPage.vue:13` GETs it; only `/payments/{order_id}` exists |

## High (5/5 confirmed)

| # | Issue | Key Finding |
|---|-------|-------------|
| 4 | `MINIO_BUCKET` undefined | Config defines `MINIO_BUCKET_RECORDINGS`; payments controller and ingestion service reference the non-existent `MINIO_BUCKET` |

27	def _verify_signature(payload: PaymentCallbackPayload) -> bool:
28	    message = f"{payload.terminal_ref}{payload.amount}{payload.timestamp}"
29	    expected = hmac.new(
30	        settings.PAYMENT_SIGNATURE_SECRET.encode(),
31	        message.encode(),
32	        hashlib.sha256,
33	    ).hexdigest()
34	    return hmac.compare_digest(expected, payload.signature)
35

37	class PaymentService:
38	    def __init__(self, db: AsyncSession) -> None:
39	        self._db = db
40	
41	    async def handle_callback(self, payload: PaymentCallbackPayload) -> PaymentResponse:
42	        sig_ok = _verify_signature(payload)
43	
44	        result = await self._db.execute(
45	            select(Payment).where(Payment.order_id == payload.order_id)
46	        )
47	        payment = result.scalar_one_or_none()
48	        if not payment:
49	            raise NotFoundError("Payment")
50	
51	        payment.terminal_ref = payload.terminal_ref
52	        payment.callback_received_at = datetime.now(UTC)
53	        payment.signature_verified = sig_ok
54	        payment.raw_callback = payload.model_dump(mode="json")
55	
56	        if sig_ok:
57	            payment.status = PaymentStatus.completed
58	            # Mark order as paid
59	            order_result = await self._db.execute(select(Order).where(Order.id == payload.order_id))
60	            order = order_result.scalar_one_or_none()
61	            if order:
62	                order.status = OrderStatus.paid
63	                order.paid_at = datetime.now(UTC)
64	                # Auto-create pending bookings for each purchased session
65	                items_result = await self._db.execute(
66	                    select(OrderItem).where(OrderItem.order_id == order.id)
67	                )
68	                for item in items_result.scalars().all():
69	                    existing = await self._db.execute(
70	                        select(Booking).where(
71	                            Booking.session_id == item.session_id,
72	                            Booking.learner_id == order.learner_id,
73	                            Booking.status.notin_([BookingStatus.cancelled]),
74	                        )
75	                    )
76	                    if not existing.scalar_one_or_none():
77	                        self._db.add(Booking(
78	                            session_id=item.session_id,
79	                            learner_id=order.learner_id,
80	                            status=BookingStatus.pending,
81	                        ))
82	        else:
83	            payment.status = PaymentStatus.failed
84	
85	        await self._db.flush()
86	        return PaymentResponse.model_validate(payment)
87	
88	    async def simulate_payment(self, order_id: uuid.UUID) -> PaymentResponse:
89	        """Generate a valid signed callback internally — for the built-in terminal simulator."""
90	        import hashlib
91	        import hmac as hmac_mod
92	
93	        order_result = await self._db.execute(select(Order).where(Order.id == order_id))
94	        order = order_result.scalar_one_or_none()
95	        if not order:
96	            raise NotFoundError("Order")
97	
98	        terminal_ref = f"SIM-{str(order_id)[:8].upper()}"
99	        amount = float(order.total)
100	        timestamp = datetime.now(UTC).isoformat()
101	        message = f"{terminal_ref}{amount}{timestamp}"
102	        signature = hmac_mod.new(
103	            settings.PAYMENT_SIGNATURE_SECRET.encode(),
104	            message.encode(),
105	            hashlib.sha256,
106	        ).hexdigest()
107	
108	        from app.modules.payments.schemas import PaymentCallbackPayload
109	        payload = PaymentCallbackPayload(
110	            order_id=order_id,
111	            terminal_ref=terminal_ref,
112	            amount=amount,
113	            timestamp=timestamp,
114	            signature=signature,
115	        )
116	        return await self.handle_callback(payload)
117	
118	    async def get_payment(self, order_id: uuid.UUID) -> PaymentResponse:
119	        result = await self._db.execute(select(Payment).where(Payment.order_id == order_id))
120	        payment = result.scalar_one_or_none()
121	        if not payment:
122	            raise NotFoundError("Payment")
123	        return PaymentResponse.model_validate(payment)
124	
125	    async def create_refund(self, payload: RefundCreate, requester_id: uuid.UUID) -> RefundResponse:
126	        payment_result = await self._db.execute(
127	            select(Payment).where(Payment.order_id == payload.order_id, Payment.status == PaymentStatus.completed)
128	        )
129	        payment = payment_result.scalar_one_or_none()
130	        if not payment:
131	            raise NotFoundError("Payment for order")
132	        if float(payload.amount) > float(payment.amount):
133	            raise UnprocessableError("Refund amount exceeds payment amount.")
134	
135	        refund = Refund(
136	            payment_id=payment.id,
137	            requested_by=requester_id,
138	            amount=payload.amount,
139	            reason=payload.reason,
140	        )
141	        self._db.add(refund)
142	        await self._db.flush()
143	        await log_audit(self._db, str(requester_id), "refund", str(refund.id), "create")
144	        return RefundResponse.model_validate(refund)
145	
146	    async def list_refunds(self, status: str | None = None) -> list[RefundResponse]:
147	        q = select(Refund)
148	        if status:
149	            q = q.where(Refund.status == status)
150	        result = await self._db.execute(q.order_by(Refund.created_at.desc()))
151	        return [RefundResponse.model_validate(r) for r in result.scalars().all()]
152	
153	    async def get_export(self, export_id: uuid.UUID) -> ReconciliationExport:
154	        result = await self._db.execute(select(ReconciliationExport).where(ReconciliationExport.id == export_id))
155	        export = result.scalar_one_or_none()
156	        if not export:
157	            raise NotFoundError("Export")
158	        return export
159	
160	    async def get_refund(self, refund_id: uuid.UUID) -> RefundResponse:
161	        result = await self._db.execute(select(Refund).where(Refund.id == refund_id))
162	        r = result.scalar_one_or_none()
163	        if not r:
164	            raise NotFoundError("Refund")
165	        return RefundResponse.model_validate(r)
166	
167	    async def approve_refund(self, refund_id: uuid.UUID, actor_id: str) -> RefundResponse:
168	        result = await self._db.execute(select(Refund).where(Refund.id == refund_id))
169	        r = result.scalar_one_or_none()
170	        if not r:
171	            raise NotFoundError("Refund")
172	        if r.status != RefundStatus.pending:
173	            raise ConflictError(f"Refund is {r.status}.")
174	        r.status = RefundStatus.approved
175	        await self._db.flush()
176	        await log_audit(self._db, actor_id, "refund", str(refund_id), "approve")
177	        return RefundResponse.model_validate(r)
178	
179	    async def complete_refund(self, refund_id: uuid.UUID, actor_id: str) -> RefundResponse:
180	        result = await self._db.execute(select(Refund).where(Refund.id == refund_id))
181	        r = result.scalar_one_or_none()
182	        if not r:
183	            raise NotFoundError("Refund")
184	        if r.status != RefundStatus.approved:
185	            raise ConflictError(f"Refund must be approved before completing.")
186	        r.status = RefundStatus.completed
187	        r.processed_at = datetime.now(UTC)
188	
189	        # Mark order as refunded
190	        payment_result = await self._db.execute(select(Payment).where(Payment.id == r.payment_id))
191	        payment = payment_result.scalar_one_or_none()
192	        if payment:
193	            order_result = await self._db.execute(select(Order).where(Order.id == payment.order_id))
194	            order = order_result.scalar_one_or_none()
195	            if order:
196	                order.status = OrderStatus.refunded
197	
198	        await self._db.flush()
199	        await log_audit(self._db, actor_id, "refund", str(refund_id), "complete")
200	        return RefundResponse.model_validate(r)
201	
202	    async def generate_reconciliation_export(self, export_date: date | None = None) -> ReconciliationExportResponse:
203	        """Generate daily reconciliation CSV. Used by Celery and by the API endpoint."""
204	        from datetime import timezone
205	
206	        if not export_date:
207	            export_date = (datetime.now(UTC) - timedelta(days=1)).date()
208	
209	        day_start = datetime(export_date.year, export_date.month, export_date.day, tzinfo=UTC)
210	        day_end = day_start + timedelta(days=1)
211	
212	        result = await self._db.execute(
213	            select(Payment, Order)
214	            .join(Order, Payment.order_id == Order.id)
215	            .where(
216	                and_(
217	                    Payment.status == PaymentStatus.completed,
218	                    Payment.callback_received_at >= day_start,
219	                    Payment.callback_received_at < day_end,
220	                )
221	            )
222	        )
223	        rows = result.all()
224	
225	        os.makedirs(settings.EXPORTS_DIR, exist_ok=True)
226	        filepath = os.path.join(settings.EXPORTS_DIR, f"reconciliation_{export_date}.csv")
227	
228	        with open(filepath, "w", newline="") as f:
229	            writer = csv.writer(f)
230	            writer.writerow(["payment_id", "order_id", "learner_id", "amount", "currency", "terminal_ref", "paid_at"])
231	            for payment, order in rows:
232	                writer.writerow([
233	                    str(payment.id), str(order.id), str(order.learner_id),
234	                    float(payment.amount), order.currency,
235	                    payment.terminal_ref or "",
236	                    order.paid_at.isoformat() if order.paid_at else "",
237	                ])
238	
239	        rec = ReconciliationExport(
240	            export_date=day_start,
241	            file_path=filepath,
242	            row_count=len(rows),
243	        )
244	        self._db.add(rec)
245	        await self._db.flush()
246	        return ReconciliationExportResponse.model_validate(rec)
247	
248	    async def list_exports(self) -> list[ReconciliationExportResponse]:
249	        result = await self._db.execute(
250	            select(ReconciliationExport).order_by(ReconciliationExport.export_date.desc()).limit(90)
251	        )
252	        return [ReconciliationExportResponse.model_validate(r) for r in result.scalars().all()]

1	"""Keyset-based pagination utilities."""

3	from __future__ import annotations
4	
5	from typing import Any, Generic, TypeVar
6	
7	from pydantic import BaseModel
8	
9	T = TypeVar("T")
10	
11	
12	class PageMeta(BaseModel):
13	    total_count: int
14	    page: int
15	    page_size: int
16	    has_next: bool
17	    query_time_ms: float | None = None
18	
19	
20	class Page(BaseModel, Generic[T]):
21	    items: list[T]
22	    meta: PageMeta
23	
24	
25	def paginate_query(query: Any, page: int, page_size: int) -> tuple[Any, int, int]:
26	    """Return (query_with_limit_offset, offset, limit)."""
27	    from app.core.config import settings
28	    page_size = min(page_size, settings.MAX_PAGE_SIZE)
29	    offset = (page - 1) * page_size
30	    return query.offset(offset).limit(page_size), offset, page_size

1	from fastapi import FastAPI, Request
2	from fastapi.exceptions import RequestValidationError
3	from fastapi.responses import JSONResponse
4	from starlette import status
5	
6	
7	class AppError(Exception):
8	    def __init__(self, message: str, status_code: int = status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST):
9	        self.message = message
10	        self.status_code = status_code
11	        super().__init__(message)
12	
13	
14	class NotFoundError(AppError):
15	    def __init__(self, resource: str = "Resource"):
16	        super().__init__(f"{resource} not found.", status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND)
17	
18	
19	class UnauthorizedError(AppError):
20	    def __init__(self, detail: str = "Not authenticated."):
21	        super().__init__(detail, status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED)
22	
23	
24	class ForbiddenError(AppError):
25	    def __init__(self, detail: str = "Insufficient permissions."):
26	        super().__init__(detail, status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN)
27	
28	
29	class GoneError(AppError):
30	    def __init__(self, detail: str = "Resource no longer available."):
31	        super().__init__(detail, status.HTTP_410_GONE)
32	
33	
34	class ConflictError(AppError):
35	    def __init__(self, detail: str = "Conflict."):
36	        super().__init__(detail, status.HTTP_409_CONFLICT)
37	
38	
39	class UnprocessableError(AppError):
40	    def __init__(self, detail: str = "Unprocessable."):
41	        super().__init__(detail, status.HTTP_422_UNPROCESSABLE_ENTITY)
42	
43	
44	def register_exception_handlers(app: FastAPI) -> None:
45	    @app.exception_handler(AppError)
46	    async def app_error_handler(request: Request, exc: AppError) -> JSONResponse:
47	        return JSONResponse(
48	            status_code=exc.status_code,
49	            content={"detail": exc.message},
50	        )
51	
52	    @app.exception_handler(RequestValidationError)
53	    async def validation_error_handler(request: Request, exc: RequestValidationError) -> JSONResponse:
54	        return JSONResponse(
55	            status_code=status.HTTP_422_UNPROCESSABLE_ENTITY,
56	            content={"detail": exc.errors()},
57	        )
58	
59	    @app.exception_handler(Exception)
60	    async def unhandled_error_handler(request: Request, exc: Exception) -> JSONResponse:
61	        return JSONResponse(
62	            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
63	            content={"detail": "An unexpected error occurred."},
64	        )

38	            )

42	            lock_until = None
43	            if attempts >= settings.LOGIN_MAX_ATTEMPTS:
44	                lock_until = datetime.now(UTC) + timedelta(minutes=settings.LOCKOUT_DURATION_MINUTES)

56	        refresh_token = create_refresh_token(str(user.id))

58	        await touch_last_seen(str(user.id))  # start inactivity clock

63	        try:
64	            payload = decode_token(refresh_token)

69	            raise UnauthorizedError("Invalid token type.")

81	        new_refresh = create_refresh_token(str(user.id))
82	        await store_refresh_token(str(user.id), new_refresh)
83	
84	        return TokenResponse(access_token=new_access, refresh_token=new_refresh)

1	# Meridian Training Operations System — Backend
2	
3	Production-grade, fully offline training management platform.
4	
5	## Start
6	
7	```bash
8	docker compose up
9	```
10	
11	All services build automatically. No manual setup required.
12	
13	## Service URLs
14	
15	| Service | URL |
16	|---|---|
17	| API | http://localhost/api |
18	| API Docs (Swagger) | http://localhost/api/docs |
19	| API Docs (ReDoc) | http://localhost/api/redoc |
20	| MinIO Console | http://localhost:9001 (minioadmin / minioadmin123) |
21	| Prometheus | http://localhost:9090 |
22	| Grafana | http://localhost:3000 (admin / admin) |
23	
24	## Verification
25	
26	```bash
27	# Health check
28	curl http://localhost/api/monitoring/health
29	# → {"status": "ok", "timestamp": "..."}
30	
31	# Login with default admin
32	curl -X POST http://localhost/api/auth/login \
33	  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
34	  -d '{"username": "admin", "password": "Admin@Meridian1"}'
35	```
36	
37	## Default Credentials
38	
39	| Role | Username | Password |
40	|---|---|---|
41	| Admin | `admin` | `Admin@Meridian1` |
42	
43	**Change the admin password immediately after first login.**
44	
45	## Configuration
46	
47	Copy `backend/.env.example` to `backend/.env` for local override. All secrets are loaded from environment variables — never hardcoded.
48	
49	Key secrets to rotate in production:
50	- `SECRET_KEY` — JWT signing key
51	- `FIELD_ENCRYPTION_KEY` — Fernet key for PII encryption
52	- `PAYMENT_SIGNATURE_SECRET` — HMAC key for terminal callbacks
53	- `MINIO_SECRET_KEY` — MinIO credentials
54	
55	## Running Tests
56	
57	```bash
58	# Inside the backend container or with local Python env:
59	docker compose exec backend pytest tests/ -v --cov=app --cov-report=term-missing
60	```
61	
62	## Architecture
63	
64	- **Backend**: FastAPI on port 8000, proxied by Nginx on port 80
65	- **Database**: PostgreSQL 15 — all state persisted here
66	- **Cache/Queue**: Redis — JWT blocklist, Celery broker, dedup sets
67	- **Jobs**: Celery worker + Beat for all scheduled tasks
68	- **Video**: MinIO (S3-compatible) for session recordings
69	- **Streaming**: Kafka for data ingestion
70	- **Monitoring**: Prometheus scrapes `/api/monitoring/metrics`; Grafana visualises
71	
72	## WebSocket Live Room
73	
74	Connect via `WS /api/ws/sessions/{session_id}/room?token=<access_jwt>`
75	
76	Receives real-time push events: `room_state`, `session_status_changed`, `attendee_joined`, `attendee_left`, `roster_update`.
77

4	from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends
5	from sqlalchemy import and_, select
6	from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
7	
8	from app.core.audit import log_audit
9	from app.core.database import get_db
10	from app.core.deps import get_current_user, require_roles
11	from app.core.exceptions import NotFoundError
12	from app.modules.promotions.models import Promotion
13	from app.modules.promotions.schemas import PromotionCreate, PromotionResponse, PromotionUpdate
14	
15	router = APIRouter(prefix="/promotions", tags=["Promotions"])
16	
17	
18	@router.get("", response_model=list[PromotionResponse])
19	async def list_promotions(is_active: bool | None = None, _=Depends(get_current_user), db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db)):
20	    q = select(Promotion)
21	    if is_active is not None:
22	        q = q.where(Promotion.is_active == is_active)
23	    result = await db.execute(q.order_by(Promotion.name))
24	    return result.scalars().all()
25	
26	
27	@router.post("", response_model=PromotionResponse, status_code=201)
28	async def create_promotion(body: PromotionCreate, current_user=Depends(require_roles("admin", "finance")), db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db)):
29	    promo = Promotion(**body.model_dump())
30	    db.add(promo)
31	    await db.flush()
32	    await db.refresh(promo)
33	    await log_audit(db, str(current_user.id), "promotion", str(promo.id), "create", new_value=body.model_dump(mode="json"))
34	    return promo
35	
36	
37	@router.get("/{promo_id}", response_model=PromotionResponse)
38	async def get_promotion(promo_id: uuid.UUID, _=Depends(get_current_user), db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db)):
39	    result = await db.execute(select(Promotion).where(Promotion.id == promo_id))
40	    p = result.scalar_one_or_none()
41	    if not p:
42	        raise NotFoundError("Promotion")
43	    return p
44	
45	
46	@router.patch("/{promo_id}", response_model=PromotionResponse)
47	async def update_promotion(promo_id: uuid.UUID, body: PromotionUpdate, current_user=Depends(require_roles("admin", "finance")), db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db)):
48	    result = await db.execute(select(Promotion).where(Promotion.id == promo_id))
49	    p = result.scalar_one_or_none()
50	    if not p:
51	        raise NotFoundError("Promotion")
52	    old = {k: getattr(p, k) for k in body.model_dump(exclude_none=True)}
53	    for k, v in body.model_dump(exclude_none=True).items():
54	        setattr(p, k, v)
55	    await db.flush()
56	    await log_audit(db, str(current_user.id), "promotion", str(p.id), "update",
57	                    old_value={k: str(v) for k, v in old.items()},
58	                    new_value=body.model_dump(exclude_none=True, mode="json"))
59	    return p
60	
61	
62	@router.delete("/{promo_id}", status_code=204)
63	async def delete_promotion(promo_id: uuid.UUID, current_user=Depends(require_roles("admin", "finance")), db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db)):
64	    result = await db.execute(select(Promotion).where(Promotion.id == promo_id))
65	    p = result.scalar_one_or_none()
66	    if not p:
67	        raise NotFoundError("Promotion")
68	    p.is_active = False
69	    await db.flush()
70	    await log_audit(db, str(current_user.id), "promotion", str(p.id), "delete")
71

1	from __future__ import annotations
2	
3	import csv
4	import hashlib
5	import hmac
6	import os
7	import uuid
8	from datetime import UTC, date, datetime, timedelta
9	
10	from sqlalchemy import and_, select
11	from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
12	
13	from app.core.audit import log_audit
14	from app.core.config import settings
15	from app.core.exceptions import ConflictError, NotFoundError, UnprocessableError
16	from app.modules.bookings.models import Booking, BookingStatus
17	from app.modules.checkout.models import Order, OrderItem, OrderStatus
18	from app.modules.payments.models import (
19	    Payment, PaymentStatus, ReconciliationExport, Refund, RefundStatus,
20	)
21	from app.modules.payments.schemas import (
22	    PaymentCallbackPayload, PaymentResponse, ReconciliationExportResponse,
23	    RefundCreate, RefundResponse,
24	)
25	
26	
27	def _verify_signature(payload: PaymentCallbackPayload) -> bool:
28	    message = f"{payload.terminal_ref}{payload.amount}{payload.timestamp}"
29	    expected = hmac.new(
30	        settings.PAYMENT_SIGNATURE_SECRET.encode(),
31	        message.encode(),
32	        hashlib.sha256,
33	    ).hexdigest()
34	    return hmac.compare_digest(expected, payload.signature)
35	
36	
37	class PaymentService:
38	    def __init__(self, db: AsyncSession) -> None:
39	        self._db = db
40	
41	    async def handle_callback(self, payload: PaymentCallbackPayload) -> PaymentResponse:
42	        sig_ok = _verify_signature(payload)
43	
44	        result = await self._db.execute(
45	            select(Payment).where(Payment.order_id == payload.order_id)
46	        )
47	        payment = result.scalar_one_or_none()
48	        if not payment:
49	            raise NotFoundError("Payment")
50	
51	        payment.terminal_ref = payload.terminal_ref
52	        payment.callback_received_at = datetime.now(UTC)
53	        payment.signature_verified = sig_ok
54	        payment.raw_callback = payload.model_dump(mode="json")
55	
56	        if sig_ok:
57	            payment.status = PaymentStatus.completed
58	            # Mark order as paid
59	            order_result = await self._db.execute(select(Order).where(Order.id == payload.order_id))
60	            order = order_result.scalar_one_or_none()
61	            if order:
62	                order.status = OrderStatus.paid
63	                order.paid_at = datetime.now(UTC)
64	                # Auto-create pending bookings for each purchased session
65	                items_result = await self._db.execute(
66	                    select(OrderItem).where(OrderItem.order_id == order.id)
67	                )
68	                for item in items_result.scalars().all():
69	                    existing = await self._db.execute(
70	                        select(Booking).where(
71	                            Booking.session_id == item.session_id,
72	                            Booking.learner_id == order.learner_id,
73	                            Booking.status.notin_([BookingStatus.cancelled]),
74	                        )
75	                    )
76	                    if not existing.scalar_one_or_none():
77	                        self._db.add(Booking(
78	                            session_id=item.session_id,
79	                            learner_id=order.learner_id,
80	                            status=BookingStatus.pending,
81	                        ))
82	        else:
83	            payment.status = PaymentStatus.failed
84	
85	        await self._db.flush()
86	        return PaymentResponse.model_validate(payment)
87	
88	    async def simulate_payment(self, order_id: uuid.UUID) -> PaymentResponse:
89	        """Generate a valid signed callback internally — for the built-in terminal simulator."""
90	        import hashlib
91	        import hmac as hmac_mod
92	
93	        order_result = await self._db.execute(select(Order).where(Order.id == order_id))
94	        order = order_result.scalar_one_or_none()
95	        if not order:
96	            raise NotFoundError("Order")
97	
98	        terminal_ref = f"SIM-{str(order_id)[:8].upper()}"
99	        amount = float(order.total)
100	        timestamp = datetime.now(UTC).isoformat()
101	        message = f"{terminal_ref}{amount}{timestamp}"
102	        signature = hmac_mod.new(
103	            settings.PAYMENT_SIGNATURE_SECRET.encode(),
104	            message.encode(),
105	            hashlib.sha256,
106	        ).hexdigest()
107	
108	        from app.modules.payments.schemas import PaymentCallbackPayload
109	        payload = PaymentCallbackPayload(
110	            order_id=order_id,
111	            terminal_ref=terminal_ref,
112	            amount=amount,
113	            timestamp=timestamp,
114	            signature=signature,
115	        )
116	        return await self.handle_callback(payload)
117	
118	    async def get_payment(self, order_id: uuid.UUID) -> PaymentResponse:
119	        result = await self._db.execute(select(Payment).where(Payment.order_id == order_id))
120	        payment = result.scalar_one_or_none()
121	        if not payment:
122	            raise NotFoundError("Payment")
123	        return PaymentResponse.model_validate(payment)
124	
125	    async def create_refund(self, payload: RefundCreate, requester_id: uuid.UUID) -> RefundResponse:
126	        payment_result = await self._db.execute(
127	            select(Payment).where(Payment.order_id == payload.order_id, Payment.status == PaymentStatus.completed)
128	        )
129	        payment = payment_result.scalar_one_or_none()
130	        if not payment:
131	            raise NotFoundError("Payment for order")
132	        if float(payload.amount) > float(payment.amount):
133	            raise UnprocessableError("Refund amount exceeds payment amount.")
134	
135	        refund = Refund(
136	            payment_id=payment.id,
137	            requested_by=requester_id,
138	            amount=payload.amount,
139	            reason=payload.reason,
140	        )
141	        self._db.add(refund)
142	        await self._db.flush()
143	        await log_audit(self._db, str(requester_id), "refund", str(refund.id), "create")
144	        return RefundResponse.model_validate(refund)
145	
146	    async def list_refunds(self, status: str | None = None) -> list[RefundResponse]:
147	        q = select(Refund)
148	        if status:
149	            q = q.where(Refund.status == status)
150	        result = await self._db.execute(q.order_by(Refund.created_at.desc()))
151	        return [RefundResponse.model_validate(r) for r in result.scalars().all()]
152	
153	    async def get_export(self, export_id: uuid.UUID) -> ReconciliationExport:
154	        result = await self._db.execute(select(ReconciliationExport).where(ReconciliationExport.id == export_id))
155	        export = result.scalar_one_or_none()
156	        if not export:
157	            raise NotFoundError("Export")
158	        return export
159	
160	    async def get_refund(self, refund_id: uuid.UUID) -> RefundResponse:
161	        result = await self._db.execute(select(Refund).where(Refund.id == refund_id))
162	        r = result.scalar_one_or_none()
163	        if not r:
164	            raise NotFoundError("Refund")
165	        return RefundResponse.model_validate(r)
166	
167	    async def approve_refund(self, refund_id: uuid.UUID, actor_id: str) -> RefundResponse:
168	        result = await self._db.execute(select(Refund).where(Refund.id == refund_id))
169	        r = result.scalar_one_or_none()
170	        if not r:
171	            raise NotFoundError("Refund")
172	        if r.status != RefundStatus.pending:
173	            raise ConflictError(f"Refund is {r.status}.")
174	        r.status = RefundStatus.approved
175	        await self._db.flush()
176	        await log_audit(self._db, actor_id, "refund", str(refund_id), "approve")
177	        return RefundResponse.model_validate(r)
178	
179	    async def complete_refund(self, refund_id: uuid.UUID, actor_id: str) -> RefundResponse:
180	        result = await self._db.execute(select(Refund).where(Refund.id == refund_id))
181	        r = result.scalar_one_or_none()
182	        if not r:
183	            raise NotFoundError("Refund")
184	        if r.status != RefundStatus.approved:
185	            raise ConflictError(f"Refund must be approved before completing.")
186	        r.status = RefundStatus.completed
187	        r.processed_at = datetime.now(UTC)
188	
189	        # Mark order as refunded
190	        payment_result = await self._db.execute(select(Payment).where(Payment.id == r.payment_id))
191	        payment = payment_result.scalar_one_or_none()
192	        if payment:

194	            order = order_result.scalar_one_or_none()
195	            if order:

197

199	        await log_audit(self._db, actor_id, "refund", str(refund_id), "complete")
200	        return RefundResponse.model_validate(r)

202	    async def generate_reconciliation_export(self, export_date: date | None = None) -> ReconciliationExportResponse:
203	        """Generate daily reconciliation CSV. Used by Celery and by the API endpoint."""
204	        from datetime import timezone
205	
206	        if not export_date:
207	            export_date = (datetime.now(UTC) - timedelta(days=1)).date()
208	
209	        day_start = datetime(export_date.year, export_date.month, export_date.day, tzinfo=UTC)
210	        day_end = day_start + timedelta(days=1)
211	
212	        result = await self._db.execute(
213	            select(Payment, Order)
214	            .join(Order, Payment.order_id == Order.id)
215	            .where(
216	                and_(
217	                    Payment.status == PaymentStatus.completed,
218	                    Payment.callback_received_at >= day_start,
219	                    Payment.callback_received_at < day_end,
220	                )
221	            )
222	        )
223	        rows = result.all()
224	
225	        os.makedirs(settings.EXPORTS_DIR, exist_ok=True)
226	        filepath = os.path.join(settings.EXPORTS_DIR, f"reconciliation_{export_date}.csv")
227	
228	        with open(filepath, "w", newline="") as f:
229	            writer = csv.writer(f)
230	            writer.writerow(["payment_id", "order_id", "learner_id", "amount", "currency", "terminal_ref", "paid_at"])
231	            for payment, order in rows:
232	                writer.writerow([
233	                    str(payment.id), str(order.id), str(order.learner_id),
234	                    float(payment.amount), order.currency,
235	                    payment.terminal_ref or "",
236	                    order.paid_at.isoformat() if order.paid_at else "",
237	                ])
238	
239	        rec = ReconciliationExport(
240	            export_date=day_start,
241	            file_path=filepath,
242	            row_count=len(rows),
243	        )
244	        self._db.add(rec)
245	        await self._db.flush()
246	        return ReconciliationExportResponse.model_validate(rec)
247	
248	    async def list_exports(self) -> list[ReconciliationExportResponse]:
249	        result = await self._db.execute(

251	        )

16	from app.modules.bookings.models import Booking, BookingStatus

18	from app.modules.payments.models import (

27	def _verify_signature(payload: PaymentCallbackPayload) -> bool:
28	    message = f"{payload.terminal_ref}{payload.amount}{payload.timestamp}"
29	    expected = hmac.new(
30	        settings.PAYMENT_SIGNATURE_SECRET.encode(),
31	        message.encode(),
32	        hashlib.sha256,
33	    ).hexdigest()
34	    return hmac.compare_digest(expected, payload.signature)
35	
36	
37	class PaymentService:
38	    def __init__(self, db: AsyncSession) -> None:
39	        self._db = db
40	
41	    async def handle_callback(self, payload: PaymentCallbackPayload) -> PaymentResponse:
42	        sig_ok = _verify_signature(payload)
43	
44	        result = await self._db.execute(
45	            select(Payment).where(Payment.order_id == payload.order_id)
46	        )
47	        payment = result.scalar_one_or_none()
48	        if not payment:
49	            raise NotFoundError("Payment")
50	
51	        payment.terminal_ref = payload.terminal_ref
52	        payment.callback_received_at = datetime.now(UTC)
53	        payment.signature_verified = sig_ok
54	        payment.raw_callback = payload.model_dump(mode="json")
55	
56	        if sig_ok:
57	            payment.status = PaymentStatus.completed
58	            # Mark order as paid
59	            order_result = await self._db.execute(select(Order).where(Order.id == payload.order_id))
60	            order = order_result.scalar_one_or_none()
61	            if order:
62	                order.status = OrderStatus.paid
63	                order.paid_at = datetime.now(UTC)
64	                # Auto-create pending bookings for each purchased session
65	                items_result = await self._db.execute(
66	                    select(OrderItem).where(OrderItem.order_id == order.id)
67	                )
68	                for item in items_result.scalars().all():
69	                    existing = await self._db.execute(
70	                        select(Booking).where(
71	                            Booking.session_id == item.session_id,
72	                            Booking.learner_id == order.learner_id,
73	                            Booking.status.notin_([BookingStatus.cancelled]),
74	                        )
75	                    )
76	                    if not existing.scalar_one_or_none():
77	                        self._db.add(Booking(
78	                            session_id=item.session_id,
79	                            learner_id=order.learner_id,
80	                            status=BookingStatus.pending,
81	                        ))
82	        else:
83	            payment.status = PaymentStatus.failed
84	
85	        await self._db.flush()
86	        return PaymentResponse.model_validate(payment)
87	
88	    async def simulate_payment(self, order_id: uuid.UUID) -> PaymentResponse:
89	        """Generate a valid signed callback internally — for the built-in terminal simulator."""
90	        import hashlib
91	        import hmac as hmac_mod
92	
93	        order_result = await self._db.execute(select(Order).where(Order.id == order_id))
94	        order = order_result.scalar_one_or_none()
95	        if not order:
96	            raise NotFoundError("Order")
97	
98	        terminal_ref = f"SIM-{str(order_id)[:8].upper()}"
99	        amount = float(order.total)
100	        timestamp = datetime.now(UTC).isoformat()
101	        message = f"{terminal_ref}{amount}{timestamp}"
102	        signature = hmac_mod.new(
103	            settings.PAYMENT_SIGNATURE_SECRET.encode(),
104	            message.encode(),
105	            hashlib.sha256,
106	        ).hexdigest()
107	
108	        from app.modules.payments.schemas import PaymentCallbackPayload
109	        payload = PaymentCallbackPayload(
110	            order_id=order_id,
111	            terminal_ref=terminal_ref,
112	            amount=amount,
113	            timestamp=timestamp,
114	            signature=signature,
115	        )
116	        return await self.handle_callback(payload)
117	
118	    async def get_payment(self, order_id: uuid.UUID) -> PaymentResponse:
119	        result = await self._db.execute(select(Payment).where(Payment.order_id == order_id))
120	        payment = result.scalar_one_or_none()
121	        if not payment:
122	            raise NotFoundError("Payment")
123	        return PaymentResponse.model_validate(payment)
124	
125	    async def create_refund(self, payload: RefundCreate, requester_id: uuid.UUID) -> RefundResponse:
126	        payment_result = await self._db.execute(
127	            select(Payment).where(Payment.order_id == payload.order_id, Payment.status == PaymentStatus.completed)
128	        )
129	        payment = payment_result.scalar_one_or_none()
130	        if not payment:
131	            raise NotFoundError("Payment for order")
132	        if float(payload.amount) > float(payment.amount):
133	            raise UnprocessableError("Refund amount exceeds payment amount.")
134	
135	        refund = Refund(
136	            payment_id=payment.id,
137	            requested_by=requester_id,
138	            amount=payload.amount,
139	            reason=payload.reason,
140	        )
141	        self._db.add(refund)
142	        await self._db.flush()
143	        await log_audit(self._db, str(requester_id), "refund", str(refund.id), "create")
144	        return RefundResponse.model_validate(refund)
145	
146	    async def list_refunds(self, status: str | None = None) -> list[RefundResponse]:
147	        q = select(Refund)
148	        if status:
149	            q = q.where(Refund.status == status)
150	        result = await self._db.execute(q.order_by(Refund.created_at.desc()))
151	        return [RefundResponse.model_validate(r) for r in result.scalars().all()]

168	        result = await self._db.execute(select(Refund).where(Refund.id == refund_id))
169	        r = result.scalar_one_or_none()
170	        if not r:
171	            raise NotFoundError("Refund")

179	    async def complete_refund(self, refund_id: uuid.UUID, actor_id: str) -> RefundResponse:

200	        return RefundResponse.model_validate(r)

1	"""Keyset-based pagination utilities."""
2	
3	from __future__ import annotations
4	
5	from typing import Any, Generic, TypeVar
6	
7	from pydantic import BaseModel
8	
9	T = TypeVar("T")
10	
11	
12	class PageMeta(BaseModel):
13	    total_count: int
14	    page: int
15	    page_size: int
16	    has_next: bool
17	    query_time_ms: float | None = None
18	
19	
20	class Page(BaseModel, Generic[T]):
21	    items: list[T]
22	    meta: PageMeta
23	
24	
25	def paginate_query(query: Any, page: int, page_size: int) -> tuple[Any, int, int]:
26	    """Return (query_with_limit_offset, offset, limit)."""
27	    from app.core.config import settings
28	    page_size = min(page_size, settings.MAX_PAGE_SIZE)
29	    offset = (page - 1) * page_size
30	    return query.offset(offset).limit(page_size), offset, page_size
31

1	from fastapi import FastAPI, Request
2	from fastapi.exceptions import RequestValidationError
3	from fastapi.responses import JSONResponse
4	from starlette import status
5	
6	
7	class AppError(Exception):
8	    def __init__(self, message: str, status_code: int = status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST):
9	        self.message = message
10	        self.status_code = status_code
11	        super().__init__(message)
12	
13	
14	class NotFoundError(AppError):
15	    def __init__(self, resource: str = "Resource"):
16	        super().__init__(f"{resource} not found.", status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND)
17	
18	
19	class UnauthorizedError(AppError):
20	    def __init__(self, detail: str = "Not authenticated."):
21	        super().__init__(detail, status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED)
22	
23	
24	class ForbiddenError(AppError):
25	    def __init__(self, detail: str = "Insufficient permissions."):
26	        super().__init__(detail, status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN)
27	
28	
29	class GoneError(AppError):
30	    def __init__(self, detail: str = "Resource no longer available."):
31	        super().__init__(detail, status.HTTP_410_GONE)
32	
33	
34	class ConflictError(AppError):
35	    def __init__(self, detail: str = "Conflict."):
36	        super().__init__(detail, status.HTTP_409_CONFLICT)
37	
38	
39	class UnprocessableError(AppError):
40	    def __init__(self, detail: str = "Unprocessable."):
41	        super().__init__(detail, status.HTTP_422_UNPROCESSABLE_ENTITY)
42	
43	
44	def register_exception_handlers(app: FastAPI) -> None:
45	    @app.exception_handler(AppError)
46	    async def app_error_handler(request: Request, exc: AppError) -> JSONResponse:
47	        return JSONResponse(
48	            status_code=exc.status_code,
49	            content={"detail": exc.message},
50	        )
51	
52	    @app.exception_handler(RequestValidationError)
53	    async def validation_error_handler(request: Request, exc: RequestValidationError) -> JSONResponse:
54	        return JSONResponse(
55	            status_code=status.HTTP_422_UNPROCESSABLE_ENTITY,
56	            content={"detail": exc.errors()},
57	        )
58	
59	    @app.exception_handler(Exception)
60	    async def unhandled_error_handler(request: Request, exc: Exception) -> JSONResponse:
61	        return JSONResponse(
62	            status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
63	            content={"detail": "An unexpected error occurred."},
64	        )
65

1	from datetime import UTC, datetime, timedelta
2	
3	from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
4	
5	from app.core.config import settings
6	from app.core.exceptions import UnauthorizedError
7	from app.core.security import (
8	    blocklist_token,
9	    create_access_token,
10	    create_refresh_token,
11	    decode_token,
12	    hash_password,
13	    revoke_all_refresh_tokens,
14	    store_refresh_token,
15	    touch_last_seen,
16	    verify_and_consume_refresh_token,
17	    verify_password,
18	)
19	from app.modules.auth.schemas import TokenResponse
20	from app.modules.users.repository import UserRepository
21	from jose import JWTError
22	
23	
24	class AuthService:
25	    def __init__(self, db: AsyncSession) -> None:
26	        self._repo = UserRepository(db)
27	
28	    async def login(self, username: str, password: str) -> TokenResponse:
29	        user = await self._repo.get_by_username(username)
30	
31	        if not user:
32	            raise UnauthorizedError("Invalid credentials.")
33	
34	        # Lockout check
35	        if user.locked_until and user.locked_until > datetime.now(UTC):
36	            raise UnauthorizedError(
37	                f"Account locked. Try again after {user.locked_until.isoformat()}."
38	            )
39	
40	        if not verify_password(password, user.password_hash):
41	            attempts = user.failed_login_attempts + 1
42	            lock_until = None
43	            if attempts >= settings.LOGIN_MAX_ATTEMPTS:
44	                lock_until = datetime.now(UTC) + timedelta(minutes=settings.LOCKOUT_DURATION_MINUTES)
45	                attempts = 0  # reset after locking
46	            await self._repo.update_login_failure(user.id, attempts, lock_until)
47	            raise UnauthorizedError("Invalid credentials.")
48	
49	        if not user.is_active:
50	            raise UnauthorizedError("Account is inactive.")
51	
52	        # Reset failure counter on success
53	        await self._repo.update_login_success(user.id)
54	
55	        access_token = create_access_token(str(user.id), user.role)
56	        refresh_token = create_refresh_token(str(user.id))
57	        await store_refresh_token(str(user.id), refresh_token)
58	        await touch_last_seen(str(user.id))  # start inactivity clock
59	
60	        return TokenResponse(access_token=access_token, refresh_token=refresh_token)
61	
62	    async def refresh(self, refresh_token: str) -> TokenResponse:
63	        try:
64	            payload = decode_token(refresh_token)
65	        except JWTError:
66	            raise UnauthorizedError("Invalid refresh token.")
67	
68	        if payload.get("type") != "refresh":
69	            raise UnauthorizedError("Invalid token type.")
70	
71	        user_id: str = payload.get("sub")
72	        valid = await verify_and_consume_refresh_token(user_id, refresh_token)
73	        if not valid:
74	            raise UnauthorizedError("Refresh token has been used or revoked.")
75	
76	        user = await self._repo.get_by_id(user_id)
77	        if not user or not user.is_active:
78	            raise UnauthorizedError("User not found or inactive.")
79	
80	        new_access = create_access_token(str(user.id), user.role)
81	        new_refresh = create_refresh_token(str(user.id))
82	        await store_refresh_token(str(user.id), new_refresh)
83	
84	        return TokenResponse(access_token=new_access, refresh_token=new_refresh)
85	
86	    async def logout(self, access_token: str, user_id: str) -> None:
87	        await revoke_all_refresh_tokens(user_id)
88	        ttl = settings.ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES * 60
89	        await blocklist_token(access_token, ttl)
90	        # Clear inactivity state so a re-login always gets a fresh window
91	        from app.core.security import get_redis
92	        await get_redis().delete(f"last_seen:{user_id}")
93	
94	    async def change_password(self, user_id: str, current_password: str, new_password: str) -> None:
95	        user = await self._repo.get_by_id(user_id)
96	        if not user:
97	            raise UnauthorizedError()
98	        if not verify_password(current_password, user.password_hash):
99	            raise UnauthorizedError("Current password is incorrect.")
100	        new_hash = hash_password(new_password)
101	        await self._repo.update_password(user.id, new_hash)
102	        await revoke_all_refresh_tokens(user_id)
103

1	# Meridian Training Operations System — Backend
2	
3	Production-grade, fully offline training management platform.
4	
5	## Start
6	
7	```bash
8	docker compose up
9	```
10	
11	All services build automatically. No manual setup required.
12	
13	## Service URLs
14	
15	| Service | URL |
16	|---|---|
17	| API | http://localhost/api |
18	| API Docs (Swagger) | http://localhost/api/docs |
19	| API Docs (ReDoc) | http://localhost/api/redoc |
20	| MinIO Console | http://localhost:9001 (minioadmin / minioadmin123) |
21	| Prometheus | http://localhost:9090 |
22	| Grafana | http://localhost:3000 (admin / admin) |
23	
24	## Verification
25	
26	```bash
27	# Health check
28	curl http://localhost/api/monitoring/health
29	# → {"status": "ok", "timestamp": "..."}
30	
31	# Login with default admin
32	curl -X POST http://localhost/api/auth/login \
33	  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
34	  -d '{"username": "admin", "password": "Admin@Meridian1"}'
35	```
36	
37	## Default Credentials
38	
39	| Role | Username | Password |
40	|---|---|---|
41	| Admin | `admin` | `Admin@Meridian1` |
42	
43	**Change the admin password immediately after first login.**
44	
45	## Configuration
46	
47	Copy `backend/.env.example` to `backend/.env` for local override. All secrets are loaded from environment variables — never hardcoded.
48	
49	Key secrets to rotate in production:
50	- `SECRET_KEY` — JWT signing key
51	- `FIELD_ENCRYPTION_KEY` — Fernet key for PII encryption
52	- `PAYMENT_SIGNATURE_SECRET` — HMAC key for terminal callbacks
53	- `MINIO_SECRET_KEY` — MinIO credentials
54	
55	## Running Tests
56	
57	```bash
58	# Inside the backend container or with local Python env:
59	docker compose exec backend pytest tests/ -v --cov=app --cov-report=term-missing
60	```
61	
62	## Architecture
63	
64	- **Backend**: FastAPI on port 8000, proxied by Nginx on port 80
65	- **Database**: PostgreSQL 15 — all state persisted here
66	- **Cache/Queue**: Redis — JWT blocklist, Celery broker, dedup sets
67	- **Jobs**: Celery worker + Beat for all scheduled tasks
68	- **Video**: MinIO (S3-compatible) for session recordings
69	- **Streaming**: Kafka for data ingestion
70	- **Monitoring**: Prometheus scrapes `/api/monitoring/metrics`; Grafana visualises
71	
72	## WebSocket Live Room
73	
74	Connect via `WS /api/ws/sessions/{session_id}/room?token=<access_jwt>`
75	
76	Receives real-time push events: `room_state`, `session_status_changed`, `attendee_joined`, `attendee_left`, `roster_update`.

1	# Meridian Training Operations System — Backend
2	
3	Production-grade, fully offline training management platform.
4	
5	## Start
6	
7	```bash
8	docker compose up
9	```
10	
11	All services build automatically. No manual setup required.
12	
13	## Service URLs
14	
15	| Service | URL |
16	|---|---|
17	| API | http://localhost/api |
18	| API Docs (Swagger) | http://localhost/api/docs |
19	| API Docs (ReDoc) | http://localhost/api/redoc |
20	| MinIO Console | http://localhost:9001 (minioadmin / minioadmin123) |
21	| Prometheus | http://localhost:9090 |
22	| Grafana | http://localhost:3000 (admin / admin) |
23	
24	## Verification
25	
26	```bash
27	# Health check
28	curl http://localhost/api/monitoring/health
29	# → {"status": "ok", "timestamp": "..."}
30	
31	# Login with default admin
32	curl -X POST http://localhost/api/auth/login \
33	  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
34	  -d '{"username": "admin", "password": "Admin@Meridian1"}'
35	```
36	
37	## Default Credentials
38	
39	| Role | Username | Password |
40	|---|---|---|
41	| Admin | `admin` | `Admin@Meridian1` |
42	
43	**Change the admin password immediately after first login.**
44	
45	## Configuration
46	
47	Copy `backend/.env.example` to `backend/.env` for local override. All secrets are loaded from environment variables — never hardcoded.
48	
49	Key secrets to rotate in production:
50	- `SECRET_KEY` — JWT signing key
51	- `FIELD_ENCRYPTION_KEY` — Fernet key for PII encryption
52	- `PAYMENT_SIGNATURE_SECRET` — HMAC key for terminal callbacks
53	- `MINIO_SECRET_KEY` — MinIO credentials
54	
55	## Running Tests
56	
57	```bash
58	# Inside the backend container or with local Python env:
59	docker compose exec backend pytest tests/ -v --cov=app --cov-report=term-missing
60	```
61	
62	## Architecture
63	
64	- **Backend**: FastAPI on port 8000, proxied by Nginx on port 80
65	- **Database**: PostgreSQL 15 — all state persisted here
66	- **Cache/Queue**: Redis — JWT blocklist, Celery broker, dedup sets
67	- **Jobs**: Celery worker + Beat for all scheduled tasks
68	- **Video**: MinIO (S3-compatible) for session recordings
69	- **Streaming**: Kafka for data ingestion
70	- **Monitoring**: Prometheus scrapes `/api/monitoring/metrics`; Grafana visualises
71	
72	## WebSocket Live Room
73	
74	Connect via `WS /api/ws/sessions/{session_id}/room?token=<access_jwt>`
75	
76	Receives real-time push events: `room_state`, `session_status_changed`, `attendee_joined`, `attendee_left`, `roster_update`.
77

25	services:
26	  # ------------------------------------------------------------------ Database
27	  db:
28	    image: postgres:15-alpine
29	    restart: unless-stopped
30	    environment:
31	      POSTGRES_DB: meridian
32	      POSTGRES_USER: meridian
33	      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: meridian
34	    volumes:
35	      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
36	    ports:
37	      - "15432:5432"
38	    healthcheck:
39	      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U meridian -d meridian"]
40	      interval: 5s
41	      timeout: 5s
42	      retries: 10
43	
44	  # -------------------------------------------------------------------- Redis
45	  redis:
46	    image: redis:7-alpine
47	    restart: unless-stopped
48	    volumes:
49	      - redis_data:/data
50	    ports:
51	      - "16379:6379"
52	    healthcheck:
53	      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "ping"]
54	      interval: 5s
55	      timeout: 3s
56	      retries: 10
57	
58	  # ----------------------------------------------------------------- Zookeeper
59	  zookeeper:
60	    image: confluentinc/cp-zookeeper:7.6.0
61	    restart: unless-stopped
62	    environment:
63	      ZOOKEEPER_CLIENT_PORT: 2181
64	      ZOOKEEPER_TICK_TIME: 2000
65	    ports:
66	      - "2181:2181"
67	
68	  # -------------------------------------------------------------------- Kafka
69	  kafka:
70	    image: confluentinc/cp-kafka:7.6.0
71	    restart: unless-stopped
72	    depends_on:
73	      - zookeeper
74	    environment:
75	      KAFKA_BROKER_ID: 1
76	      KAFKA_ZOOKEEPER_CONNECT: zookeeper:2181
77	      KAFKA_ADVERTISED_LISTENERS: PLAINTEXT://kafka:9092,PLAINTEXT_HOST://localhost:29092
78	      KAFKA_LISTENER_SECURITY_PROTOCOL_MAP: PLAINTEXT:PLAINTEXT,PLAINTEXT_HOST:PLAINTEXT
79	      KAFKA_INTER_BROKER_LISTENER_NAME: PLAINTEXT
80	      KAFKA_OFFSETS_TOPIC_REPLICATION_FACTOR: 1
81	      KAFKA_AUTO_CREATE_TOPICS_ENABLE: "true"
82	    ports:
83	      - "19092:9092"
84	      - "29092:29092"
85	
86	  # -------------------------------------------------------------------- MinIO
87	  minio:
88	    image: minio/minio:latest
89	    restart: unless-stopped
90	    command: server /data --console-address ":9001"
91	    environment:
92	      MINIO_ROOT_USER: minioadmin
93	      MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD: minioadmin123
94	    volumes:
95	      - minio_data:/data
96	    ports:
97	      - "19000:9000"
98	      - "19001:9001"
99	    healthcheck:
100	      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:9000/minio/health/live"]
101	      interval: 10s
102	      timeout: 5s
103	      retries: 5
104	
105	  # ------------------------------------------------- MinIO bucket initialiser
106	  minio-init:
107	    image: minio/mc:latest
108	    depends_on:
109	      minio:
110	        condition: service_healthy
111	    entrypoint: >
112	      /bin/sh -c "
113	      mc alias set myminio http://minio:9000 minioadmin minioadmin123;
114	      mc mb --ignore-existing myminio/session-recordings;
115	      mc anonymous set download myminio/session-recordings;
116	      echo 'MinIO bucket ready.';
117	      "
118	    restart: on-failure
119	
120	  # ------------------------------------------------------------------ Backend
121	  backend:
122	    build:
123	      context: ./backend
124	      dockerfile: Dockerfile
125	    restart: unless-stopped
126	    environment:
127	      <<: *backend-env
128	    depends_on:
129	      db:
130	        condition: service_healthy
131	      redis:
132	        condition: service_healthy
133	      minio:
134	        condition: service_healthy
135	    volumes:
136	      - exports_data:/app/exports
137	      - uploads_data:/app/uploads
138	    ports:
139	      - "8000:8000"
140	    healthcheck:
141	      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:8000/api/monitoring/health"]
142	      interval: 10s
143	      timeout: 5s
144	      retries: 10
145	
146	  # ----------------------------------------------------------- Celery Worker
147	  celery_worker:
148	    build:
149	      context: ./backend
150	      dockerfile: Dockerfile
151	    restart: unless-stopped
152	    entrypoint: ["/bin/bash", "/app/celery-entrypoint.sh"]
153	    environment:
154	      <<: *backend-env
155	      CELERY_ROLE: worker
156	    depends_on:
157	      db:
158	        condition: service_healthy
159	      redis:
160	        condition: service_healthy
161	    volumes:
162	      - exports_data:/app/exports
163	      - uploads_data:/app/uploads
164	
165	  # ------------------------------------------------------------ Celery Beat
166	  celery_beat:
167	    build:
168	      context: ./backend
169	      dockerfile: Dockerfile
170	    restart: unless-stopped
171	    entrypoint: ["/bin/bash", "/app/celery-entrypoint.sh"]
172	    environment:
173	      <<: *backend-env
174	      CELERY_ROLE: beat
175	    depends_on:
176	      db:
177	        condition: service_healthy
178	      redis:
179	        condition: service_healthy
180	
181	  # ----------------------------------------------------------------- Frontend SPA
182	  frontend:
183	    build:
184	      context: ./frontend
185	      dockerfile: Dockerfile
186	    restart: unless-stopped
187	    # No external port — served via nginx reverse proxy on port 80
188	
189	  # -------------------------------------------------------------------- Nginx
190	  nginx:
191	    build:
192	      context: ./nginx
193	      dockerfile: Dockerfile
194	    restart: unless-stopped
195	    depends_on:
196	      backend:
197	        condition: service_healthy
198	      frontend:
199	        condition: service_started
200	    ports:
201	      - "80:80"
202	
203	  # --------------------------------------------------------------- Prometheus
204	  prometheus:
205	    image: prom/prometheus:latest
206	    restart: unless-stopped
207	    volumes:
208	      - ./monitoring/prometheus.yml:/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml:ro
209	      - prometheus_data:/prometheus
210	    ports:
211	      - "19090:9090"
212	    command:
213	      - "--config.file=/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml"
214	      - "--storage.tsdb.path=/prometheus"
215	      - "--web.console.libraries=/usr/share/prometheus/console_libraries"
216	      - "--web.console.templates=/usr/share/prometheus/consoles"
217	
218	  # ------------------------------------------------------------------ Grafana
219	  grafana:
220	    image: grafana/grafana:latest
221	    restart: unless-stopped
222	    environment:
223	      GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_PASSWORD: admin
224	      GF_USERS_ALLOW_SIGN_UP: "false"
225	    volumes:
226	      - grafana_data:/var/lib/grafana
227	      - ./monitoring/grafana/provisioning:/etc/grafana/provisioning:ro
228	    ports:
229	      - "3000:3000"
230	    depends_on:
231	      - prometheus
232

236	  minio_data:
237	  exports_data:
238	  uploads_data:
239	  grafana_data:
240	  prometheus_data:
